title: Cockpit bootstrap: two tabs, three cockpit panes, rooted at the MAIN checkout
action: One command that builds D13's layout. Required flag --main-root PATH: the cockpit's panes MUST be rooted at the MAIN checkout, because `bee worktree new` and `bee worktree merge` both refuse to run from inside a linked worktree - without this the dispatch loop would fail every single iteration while dutifully continuing, which is the silent stall D6's rationale exists to prevent. Required --workspace ID. The script CREATES BOTH TABS explicitly: `herdr tab create --label cockpit --cwd <main-root>` and `herdr tab create --label runtime --cwd <main-root>`; it never repurposes the workspace's pre-existing root tab. Cockpit is then split `--direction right` and that right pane `--direction down`, yielding chat / dispatch / merge; every split also carries --cwd <main-root>. Do NOT label the control panes - self-naming is D17's contract. Before starting anything, refuse loudly if .bee/tmp/herdr-orchestrating.stop exists: a leftover stop file would silently no-op every loop it starts, which is the same silent-stall class as the cwd bug. Flags --no-start (build the layout, launch no agent) and --dry-run (print the herdr commands, execute nothing). Directory name is herdr-orchestrating (D21). Byte-identical copies in both roots.

truths: A fresh workspace ends with exactly 3 tabs and exactly 5 panes: its own root tab and pane, plus cockpit (3 panes) and runtime (1 pane)
Every pane the script creates has the --main-root path as its cwd
--main-root is required; the script refuses without it
A pre-existing stop file makes the script refuse instead of starting a loop that cannot run
No pane the script creates carries a label

artifacts.substantive: layout builder rooted at the main checkout, refusing on a stale stop file

prohibitions: Do not label the dispatch or merge pane (D17)
Do not touch any workspace other than the one named by --workspace
Do not use herdr worktree create|open|remove

verify: set -e; S=.claude/skills/herdr-orchestrating/scripts/bootstrap-cockpit.sh; MAIN=/home/vantt/projects/herdr-gateway; rm -f .bee/tmp/herdr-orchestrating.stop; RAW=$(herdr workspace create --cwd /tmp --label apo-verify --no-focus); trap 'herdr workspace list 2>/dev/null | node -e "let s=\"\";process.stdin.on(\"data\",d=>s+=d).on(\"end\",()=>{try{(JSON.parse(s).result.workspaces||[]).filter(w=>w.label===\"apo-verify\").forEach(w=>console.log(w.workspace_id))}catch(e){}})" | while read -r w; do herdr workspace close "$w" >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; done' EXIT; N=$(printf '%s' "$RAW" | node -e "let s='';process.stdin.on('data',d=>s+=d).on('end',()=>console.log(JSON.parse(s).result.workspace.workspace_id))"); bash "$S" --workspace "$N" --main-root "$MAIN" --no-start; T=$(herdr tab list --workspace "$N" | node -e "let s='';process.stdin.on('data',d=>s+=d).on('end',()=>console.log(JSON.parse(s).result.tabs.length))"); test "$T" = 3; herdr pane list --workspace "$N" | node -e "let s='';process.stdin.on('data',d=>s+=d).on('end',()=>{const p=JSON.parse(s).result.panes;if(p.length!==5){console.error('panes='+p.length);process.exit(1)}const rooted=p.filter(x=>x.cwd==='$MAIN').length;if(rooted!==4){console.error('rooted='+rooted);process.exit(1)}if(p.some(x=>x.label)){console.error('labelled pane found');process.exit(1)}})"; ! bash "$S" --workspace "$N" --no-start 2>/dev/null; diff -q "$S" .agents/skills/herdr-orchestrating/scripts/bootstrap-cockpit.sh; echo LAYOUT_OK
